rows.label: tev019101_SEL0011
rows.name: Ask Enrai for his thoughts on your battle with the Zu Pharg.

rows.label: tev019101_MSG0001
rows.name:
The Growth have a history of using such death
machines to wage scorched-earth warfare. They've
apparently been used to destroy numerous worlds.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev019101_MSG0002
rows.name:
You might say that the Growth consider
these giant weapons of mass annihilation
to be their trump card.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev019101_MSG0003
rows.name:
I assumed your encounter would have ended
in tragedy as well. We were fortunate that
you were able to destroy it when you did.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev019101_MSG0010
rows.name:
Gathering zesian fleawort,
chasing after rizattices...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev019101_MSG0011
rows.name:
Lately, we've been taking on smaller
missions that we can handle at our
current level of experience.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev019101_MSG0012
rows.name:
With enough practice from those sorts of simple
jobs, we can grow into a team that's strong
enough to complete more important assignments.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev019101_MSG0013
rows.name:
I will never forget the lessons you
risked life and limb to teach us.
Thank you for showing us the way.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev019101_MSG0014
rows.name:
I must stay diligent in my
training so that one day I
can repay this debt to you.[ST:wait ]
